generated_oml:
instance BCSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor component for real-time environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorData
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSensor
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from Building Control System sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcess
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator component for controlling HVAC and lighting systems"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System controller managing actuator operations and sensor data"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational geometric representation utilizing Building Information Modeling (BIM) enriched with Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcess
]

instance BIMStaticData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Static design and engineering data from Building Information Modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcess
]

instance MDEProcess : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for automatic extraction of structured representations from enriched BIM models and generation of deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InfrastructureOptimizationService, DecisionMakingService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics to adapt to operational changes"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InfrastructureOptimizationService, DecisionMakingService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and interactive visualization service providing immersive monitoring and control interfaces for continuous synchronization between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for maintenance and operational forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance InfrastructureOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Infrastructure optimization service for improving building performance and resource efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities service supporting stakeholders in AECO domain across building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionInsight
]

instance RealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for continuous synchronization between physical and digital systems"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance and operational forecasting"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for infrastructure performance and resource efficiency"
]

instance DecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights for operational decision-making"
]

instance AECOInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Infrastructure assets in AECO domain integrating static models and real-time operational data for simulation, analysis, and optimization"
    base:contains BCSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments, Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) based transformation to generate deployable artifacts, and runtime operations featuring real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization. Governance involves Building Control Engineers (device modeling, control logic), Facility Managers (monitoring and operation), and DT Engineers (custom service integration), ensuring seamless phase transitions from static BIM to dynamic DTs."
]
